title: [COBBLEMON] Eternal Floette
description: This datapack adds "Eternal Flower" Floette form, from Pokémon XYZ.
body:
# **INTRODUCTION**
Hello! This is my first datapack. It adds the "Eternal Flower" Floette from Pokémon XYZ.
This datapack requires [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon).

# **HOW TO GET**
- **Trough commands:** /pokespawn floette eternalflower 
- **Trough vanilla:** Eternal Floette is an ultra-rare pokemon. It will spawn in any part of the overworld, with the condition of having a wither rose near and being on night time.

# **INSTALLATION**
Put the zip downloaded on both your **"resourcepacks"** folders and in your world's **"datapacks"** folder.

# **IMPORTANT LINKS**
- This datapack is **compatible** with [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons).
- Support the modeller i commissioned on [ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/darzoth).
